description_long: This is a dark, metallic vase with a rounded body and a flared rim, featuring intricate raised patterns and stylized animal motifs. The surface is adorned with swirling designs and reliefs, including prominent sculpted animal heads that serve as decorative handles on either side. The base is thick and sturdy, with additional ornamental detailing that complements the body. The overall finish is glossy, giving the vase a reflective sheen and highlighting the depth of its carvings. The craftsmanship suggests a ceremonial or decorative purpose, with a design reminiscent of ancient bronze vessels. The vase appears solid and heavy, suitable for display in a prominent urban or public setting.
description: A dark, glossy metallic vase with ornate animal head handles and intricate raised patterns, exuding a ceremonial and decorative presence.
description_view_0: This view highlights one of the sculpted animal head handles and the swirling relief patterns on the rounded body.
description_view_1: Both animal head handles are visible, showing the symmetrical placement and the full extent of the decorative motifs.
description_view_2: The side profile emphasizes the curvature of the vase and the detailed relief work, with one handle partially visible.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, displaying both handles and the ornate surface patterns, but from the opposite side.
